premium.title: AI Habit Analysis

about.title: About Habit Tracker
about.desc: DopaBrain Habit Tracker helps you build better habits daily. Track streaks, view weekly/monthly statistics, get motivational quotes, and visualize your progress with a GitHub-style annual heatmap. Quick templates, achievement badges, and category management. Completely free.
about.howDesc: Create habits with the 'Add Habit' button or choose from quick templates. Check off completed habits daily to build streaks. View progress in the Stats tab and visualize annual patterns in the Heatmap tab.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How many habits can I add?
faq.a1: Unlimited. You can add and track as many habits as you want.
faq.a2: The heatmap is a GitHub-style annual visualization showing your habit completion intensity for each day using color gradients. See your patterns at a glance.
faq.a3: Yes, all data is stored in your browser's LocalStorage and never sent to any server. Your data stays completely private.
faq.a4: Badges are earned automatically as you complete habits consistently. Reach milestones like 7-day, 30-day, and 100-day streaks to unlock achievement badges.
faq.a5: Yes, all features are completely free. Enjoy unlimited habit tracking, statistics, heatmap, and badges at no cost.
